**Skill:**

## Are you able to contribute?

- [ ] I'd like to build this module myself (see the Skill Proposal template instead)
- [ ] I have domain expertise and could help review it
- [ ] I just want it to exist — happy to test it when it's built

---

*Upvote this issue (👍 reaction) if you also want this skill.*
*High-upvote requests get prioritized.*
